name: 傻白甜母親×蛇蠍閨蜜（信任崩塌）
name_en: Naive Mother × Treacherous Best Friend (Trust Collapse)
description: 母親對閨蜜的絕對信任與閨蜜的極致背叛形成最大反差。從小一起長大的情誼被揭露為徹頭徹尾的利用，讓觀眾的憤怒和心疼達到頂峰。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Zhang Hui, if you dare to insult Xixi again... / Don't blame me for not remembering our decades-long sisterhood. / I never intended to save you back then. / Fu Xintong, you're really stupid! / I just had my eye on your bracelet.
examples.context: 母親對閨蜜的絕對信任與閨蜜的極致背叛形成最大反差。從小一起長大的情誼被揭露為徹頭徹尾的利用，讓觀眾的憤怒和心疼達到頂峰。
